name: Tableau
description: Tableau Cloud / Tableau Server - business intelligence and analytics platform by Salesforce. Monitors user access, site roles, and platform availability.

config.setupInstructions:
Setup steps:

1. Log in to your Tableau Cloud or Tableau Server site

2. Create a Personal Access Token (PAT):
   - Click your profile icon in the top-right corner
   - Select 'Account Settings' (or 'My Account Settings')
   - Scroll to 'Personal Access Tokens'
   - Click 'Create a new token'
   - Enter a token name and click 'Create'
   - Important: Copy the token secret immediately - it is only shown once

3. Find your Site URL:
   - Tableau Cloud: The URL in your browser, including the pod name (e.g., https://10ax.online.tableau.com)
   - Tableau Server: Your server address (e.g., https://tableau.yourcompany.com)

4. Find your Site Name (Content URL):
   - Look at your browser URL after logging in
   - The site name appears after /#/site/ in the URL path
   - Example: For https://10ax.online.tableau.com/#/site/MySite, enter 'MySite'
   - For Tableau Server default site, leave this field empty

Note: The PAT must belong to a user with Site Administrator or Server Administrator role to list all users.

credentialFields.label: Site URL
credentialFields.helpText: Your Tableau Cloud or Tableau Server URL (e.g., https://10ax.online.tableau.com or https://tableau.yourcompany.com). Include the pod name for Tableau Cloud.

credentialFields.label: Site Name (Content URL)
credentialFields.helpText: The content URL of your site. Found in your browser address bar after /#/site/. For example, if your URL is https://10ax.online.tableau.com/#/site/MySite, enter 'MySite'. For Tableau Server default site, leave empty.

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token Name
credentialFields.helpText: The name of your Personal Access Token (PAT). Generate one from Account Settings in Tableau Cloud or Tableau Server.

credentialFields.label: Personal Access Token Secret
credentialFields.helpText: The secret value of your Personal Access Token. This is only shown once when you create the token - copy it immediately.

checks.name: Tableau App Availability
checks.description: Verifies that the Tableau site is accessible by signing in with Personal Access Token credentials and querying site information.

checks.name: Tableau Employee Access
checks.description: Lists all site users and their site roles (Creator, Explorer, Viewer, Site Administrator, etc.) for access review and compliance monitoring.
